name: Rule Change: The ERB Way
description: See how the Effortless Rulebook handles business rule changes with a single source of truth
author: ERB Team

scenes.title: The ERB Advantage
scenes.summary:
5 minutes to change the rule, all systems automatically regenerated, and guaranteed consistency across every output.

This is the power of Single Source of Truth.
lessons: Define the rule once in Airtable
Consistency is guaranteed, not hoped for

title: Rule Change: The ERB Way
